name: Shrimp and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound shrimp or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for rice.
2. Meanwhile, remove tails from shrimp if needed.
3. Add rice to boiling water and cook according to package directions.
4. In a skillet, add 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat. Cook onions until tender but not browned.
5. Add garlic and cook until soft but not browned.
6. Add shrimp and cook until pink. Turn constantly to avoid overcooking.
7. Stir in seasonings, wine, remaining oil if needed.
8. When rice is done, stir in butter. If desired, garnish with bread crumbs and mix well.
9. Serve the shrimp mixture over the cooked rice.
This recipe is easy to make and can be adjusted as desired. My family loves it. Inspired by a memorable shrimp scampi experience at a restaurant a few years ago. You may add a pinch of tabasco or hot pepper flakes if you prefer. Enjoy!
